description_long: This is a modern, high-roof van with a streamlined, elongated body and large tinted windows along both sides. The van features a prominent front grille with a three-pointed star emblem, indicating a luxury or commercial design. The side profile reveals sliding doors and flush door handles, while the rear has large, vertically split doors for cargo or passenger access. The wheels are alloy with a multi-spoke design, and the body is primarily white with black trim along the lower panels and bumpers. The roof is slightly contoured with subtle ridges, and the windows are expansive, suggesting a passenger or shuttle configuration. The overall appearance is sleek, functional, and suitable for urban transport or shuttle services.
description: A sleek, high-roof van with large tinted windows, white body, and black trim, featuring a prominent front grille and alloy wheels.
description_view_0: Rear view showing large, vertically split rear doors, black bumper, and rear window.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long row of tinted windows, sliding side door, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the prominent grille with a three-pointed star emblem, large windshield, and side mirrors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with large windows and visible door seams.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
